case_title: ROBERT M. SMITH VS. PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-05-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO NOV-13-2017 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2017 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SMITH, ROBERT M. AS TO DEFENDANT PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-05-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER (SC-152) ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL: THE REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL IS APPROVED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-13-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-13-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF ROBERT M. SMITH APPEARED. DEFENDANT PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY CANDICE KOELKER, SR. CLAIMS EXAMINER. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED AUG-01-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SMITH, ROBERT M. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP THE ONE YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS, CCP SECTION 340.5 HAS RUN ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. ADDITIONALLY, THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED DOES NOT SUPPORT THAT ANY ACT OR OMISSION BY THE DEFENDANT WAS A CAUSE OF DAMAGE, LOSS OR HARM TO THE PLAINTIFF OR THAT DEFENDANT'S TREATMENT OF PLAINTIFF BELOW THE STANDARD OF CARE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SMITH, ROBERT M. AS TO DEFENDANT PERMANENTE MEDICAL GROUP
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO RENEE TIMP, KAISER PERM, 2425 GEARY BLVD, SF 94115
